title: eupatorium leucocephalum
intro: Eupatorium leucocephalum, also known as the White Snakeroot, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, headaches, and rheumatism, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and gout. Eupatorium leucocephalum can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or poultice, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
